name: S2_count_ones
description: Standalone program: returns 255 if no args; else returns (first byte of argv[1]) + (count of '1' digits in all args) modulo 256.
io_hint: Apply the same algorithm while ensuring your for/while loops traverse every provided token and accumulate via a well-defined predicate (e.g., count of characters matching a class), not by recognizing fixed strings. The output must be a pure function of inputs (same inputs → same result), independent of environment, time, or hidden state.
